description: Account of expenditure for the distribution of bread (100 pounds costing 31 1/2 dirhams) and for payments to a nasi, to teachers, and other officials during the eleventh week of the liturgical year (Dec. 1241/early Tevet 1553 Sel). (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 453, App. B 50)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
